div.p: Referring to your instruction 223 and my dispatch No. 316, missionary troubles still spreading. The situation very critical. The ministers of England, France, Germany, Italy, and the United States to-day sent foreign office second identical note demanding publication of strong imperial decree without delay. If Chinese Government absolutely refuse and the situation does not materially improve, I advise naval demonstration by war vessels of each Government should be made in North China waters. My colleagues have telegraphed their Government similarly.
